channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon reveals it used more energy than New Zealand in 2025 as its carbon footprint rises 16%
item.description: AWS has more data centers than before, hence the rise in emissions, but supply chain emissions are still a major problem.

item.title: Mystery box shows are complicated for everyone — even the actors
item.description: Silo is such a complicated show that even its showrunner gets confused sometimes. While filming the final seasons of the Apple TV sci-fi thriller, Graham Yost remembers two instances where he messed up details: once it was an actor who realized that a conversation they were about to shoot should've already taken place, the other […]

item.title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
item.description: Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.

item.title: Hasselblad fans can now ditch Adobe for good — as Capture One support makes its cameras much more appealing for pros
item.description: For commercial and professional photographers, the partnership between these two Scandinavian-based companies had to happen.

item.title: Portugal-Croatie : comment voir le 16e de finale en streaming ?
item.description: Le Portugal affronte la Croatie cette nuit en 16e de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026. Voici à quelle heure, sur quelle chaîne et comment regarder le match en streaming, gratuitement ou via un abonnement.

item.title: WhatsApp should freeze username rollout as it could ‘increase cybercrimes’, says India — but Meta claims impersonation isn’t an issue
item.description: The great WhatsApp username rush is on, but there may be problems with scammers and impersonations.

item.title: With another heatwave coming, I'm tracking the best deals on big-name fans — here are the quiet, bedroom-ready models I'd buy before they go out of stock
item.description: The temperature is set to soar again, so make sure you're ready by grabbing one of these quiet, effective fans for a bargain price.

item.title: Analysts say Sony's digital-only plan 'almost certainly guarantees that the PS6 won’t arrive until 2028 at the earliest' and won't have a disc drive
item.description: Following Sony's announcement halting the production of physical games within the next two years, analysts have determined that the PS6 will launch in 2028.

item.title: Samsung revives its best Galaxy S26 Ultra deal ever for 4th of July — get a record-beating $350 discount without a trade
item.description: This deal originally popped up last week, but it's back again for Samsung's massive 4th of July sale today.

item.title: 8 Best Travel Adapters (2026): My Top Recommendations
item.description: When going abroad, the right plugs are essential to keep your gadgets charged. These are my favorite travel adapters and chargers.

item.title: Après Google et Cloudflare, Microsoft accélère son passage au chiffrement post‑quantique
item.description: Microsoft s'engage à sécuriser ses services critiques contre les ordinateurs quantiques d'ici 2029. Le géant américain rejoint ainsi Google et Cloudflare, qui ont eux aussi accéléré leur calendrier face à la menace qui se profile.

item.title: New iPad Pro tipped for launch in 2027 — but it’s shrouded in price hike and chip confusion
item.description: The next iPad Pro is tipped to land in early 2027, but this might be a minor refresh with a very high price.

item.title: ‘I’m returning mine’: The new Google Home Speaker is off to bad start as users complain of delayed responses — but Google says a solution is on the way
item.description: The new Google Home Speaker is already facing its share of early issues, but the company says a fix is on the way.

item.title: Amazon is ready to deploy the Leo satellite broadband service
item.description: There are now enough Amazon Leo satellites to launch the service, but its constellation is still tiny compared to Starlink's.

item.title: Motorola Razr Fold : déjà 400 € de remise sur le nouveau rival du Galaxy Z Fold de Samsung
item.description: Pour son tout premier smartphone pliant au format livre, Motorola frappe fort en bousculant la concurrence. Eh oui, le Razr Fold s'affiche déjà en promotion de 400 euros.

item.title: A strange attempt to revive the 3DO is already dead
item.description: A long-defunct developer returned from the dead promising to revive the 3DO, but quickly pulled its pledge when it became apparent it didn't have the right to.

item.title: 'The best Mac ever': Boost your Mac mini's storage and connectivity with Ugreen's secret weapon — the M4 Dock & Stand is under $55 at Amazon right now
item.description: Boost your Apple Mac mini's storage and connectivity — Ugreen's Dock & Stand with SSD enclosure is currently 39% off at Amazon.

item.title: I tried Nano Banana 2 Lite, Google's new 4-second AI image generator, and it changes how you use AI art
item.description: Nano Banana 2 Lite makes AI images dramatically faster and changes the creative process.

item.title: Lexar TouchLock Portable SSD review: One of the simplest and cheapest hardware-encrypted drive for protecting files I've ever tested
item.description: Designed for mobile phones and laptops, this secure, portable SSD features an ingenious NFC lock that can be activated via a dedicated app. This app ensures that access to the drive's contents can be authorised only by those with the right key; otherwise, unlike software encryption, the drive just won’t mount.

item.title: Bublue BuVortex V5 Pool Skimmer Review: An Impractical Cleaner
item.description: The Bublue BuVortex V5 ditches conventional skimming for a vortex-powered design that’s fascinating to watch, even if it’s severely impractical.

item.title: TV Time ferme le 15 juillet : comment sauver vos séries sur BetaSeries, l’alternative française
item.description: TV Time ferme le 15 juillet 2026. Si vous suivez vos séries dessus depuis des années, voici comment rapatrier votre historique sur BetaSeries, l’alternative française, en deux étapes.

item.title: How Trump Helped China Make America’s Cheapest EV
item.description: Slate is the latest automaker to transition to lower-cost batteries perfected in China, driven in part by the repeal of EV tax credits that required materials to be sourced domestically.

item.title: BitTorrent’s disastrous, legendary, and controversial story
item.description: Twenty-five years ago today, a young, little-known programmer by the name of Bram Cohen fired off a short message to a mailing list for peer-to-peer enthusiasts. "My new app, BitTorrent, is now in working order, check it out here," Cohen wrote, followed by a link to his personal website. "What's BitTorrent, Bram?" the founder of […]

item.title: Espagne-Autriche en 16e de finale : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne regarder le match ce jeudi 2 juillet ?
item.description: Les 16es de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026 débutent avec une affiche solide : l'Espagne affronte l'Autriche ce jeudi 2 juillet à 21h00, et le match est accessible gratuitement sur M6. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir pour ne rien manquer, en direct ou en streaming.

item.title: Mythos shows why AI governance must catch up to the speed of risk discovery
item.description: AI is accelerating risk discovery, forcing businesses to confront governance gaps before exposures multiply further.

item.title: Opera's new security feature stops copy paste attacks from malicious websites
item.description: Opera has introduced a new safety feature that protects against malicious 'ClickFix' clipboard attacks.

item.title: How to watch McNally vs. Rybakina online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream McNally vs. Rybakina in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Royer vs. Zverev online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Royer vs. Zverev in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: 7 new horror movies on Netflix, Prime Video, Shudder, and more in July 2026
item.description: July is packed full of great horror movies — here are seven recommendations to keep you entertained this month.

item.title: Keep running low on storage and don't know why? Mysterious Windows 11 file that ate tons of drive space is fixed in latest update
item.description: If your drive space has been mysteriously disappearing of late, the problem could be Capability Access Manager.

item.title: ‘Something has gone completely wrong’: Palantir CEO Alex Karp slams OpenAI, says AI industry is "effing insane"
item.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp hits out at Anthropic and OpenAI in heated interview.

item.title: Don't pay silly prices for DDR5 memory — Newegg's 4th of July sale is packed with unmissable RAM deals right now
item.description: Newegg's July 4 sale cuts prices on DDR5 memory kits from Corsair, G.Skill, TeamGroup, and V-color.

item.title: I Tried Rips, the Card-Pack App Where Users Spend Thousands Chasing Pricey Pokémon
item.description: I ripped open $892 worth of Pokémon packs on my phone in under 15 minutes and walked away with 62 cents. My adrenaline rush felt like the future of gambling.

item.title: Exclusive: Blood Message developer says latest trailer's glowing reception gives them 'confidence' — 'We are very excited to see that they love this story'
item.description: The Blood Message team appreciates the warm reception to the game so far.

item.title: The World Cup is getting hotter. A sports architect shares how stadiums can adapt
item.description: Intentional venue design can keep players and fans cooler as temperatures rise. Fans and players at the World Cup this year are facing the heat as summer temperatures skyrocket, but smart stadium design can help keep them cooler than they would otherwise be.

item.title: The new InfoWars website will make you forget all about Alex Jones—eventually
item.description: The Onion’s relaunch of InfoWars is burying Jones’s legacy with a perfectly weird website that maybe, just maybe, will get you off of social media. Tim Heidecker’s favorite form of comedy wastes your time. So there’s no better punch line than the internet, society’s ultimate time suck, which has woven its addictive, algorithmic tendrils into every single aspect of our lives, bottoming out in the silty, dark, disorienting unreality of Alex Jones. InfoWars, the right-wing conspiracy theorist’s poison pill of a brand, went up for auction in 2024 after the families of the victims of a 2012 mass sh...

item.title: Panneaux solaires : Dualsun et deux autres fabricants débloquent la TVA à 5,5 % et 1 600 € d’économie
item.description: L'annonce de la TVA réduite à 5,5 % sur certaines installations solaires a laissé croire à de nombreux particuliers que le coût d’un projet allait devenir moins cher. Dans les faits, seuls les acheteurs de panneaux répondant à des critères très stricts peuvent en bénéficier. Or, ces modèles restent rares sur le marché. Bonne nouvelle toutefois : la liste des panneaux éligibles vient de s'étoffer. ...

item.title: Trump has made more than $1 billion from crypto in a year. How?
item.description: Donald Trump made over $1 billion from cryptocurrency in 2026, with his business dealings laid out in a 927-page mandatory report.

item.title: Acer Predator Orion 3000 : cette tour gaming avec une RTX 5060 est 400 € moins cher chez Darty
item.description: L'Acer Predator Orion 3000 est une unité centrale qui embarque un Intel Core i7, 32 Go de RAM et une RTX 5060. Alors que l'addition pourrait être salée en cette période d'inflation, Darty baisse son prix de 22 %.

item.title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
item.description: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. CEO Sam Altman argued that giving the public a financial interest in the company would be the best way to share […]

item.title: La canicule va faire son retour : voici les meilleurs deals ventilateurs et climatiseurs des soldes d’été avant la rupture des stocks
item.description: Une nouvelle canicule approche : profitez des soldes d'été pour vous équiper sans vous ruiner ! Climatiseurs connectés et ventilateurs performants sont déjà à prix cassés. Découvrez notre sélection des meilleures offres avant la rupture de stock.
